author: spencer_tb
content:
Which EL clients have the most up to date FOCIL branches - Besu/Etherex right? We'd like to start creating initial FOCIL EL test releases and we were thinking of basing them on the most update stable amsterdam devnet branches (`bal-devnet-7` currently), does that sound good?

We will create a test release tracker similar to https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/issues/2915, with all the EL specifc changes required before a release!

cc <@1443132403001589771> <@741651225576996935> <@510888004366368794>

author: edgl_dev
content: Sounds good, currently  our focil branch is based off glamsterdam-devnet-5, which has all of bal-devnet-7 + target gas limit fcu
